meta.title: AXIEL Core — Your patient journey on autopilot
meta.description: From first click to ongoing care: online booking, automatic questionnaires, visual assessment, AI-drafted reports and billing — in one place, in your patient's language. 30 days free, no credit card.

hero.title: Your patient journey on autopilot.
hero.subtitle: From first click to ongoing care: online booking, automatic questionnaires, visual assessment, AI-drafted reports and billing — in one place, in your patient's language.
hero.microProof: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
hero.videoCaption: Narrated in Portuguese. English version coming soon.

pain.card1Text: First session done, promises to come back… gone. Without systematic follow-up, next month's schedule is luck.
pain.card2Text: Notes in a notebook, labs in a PDF, plan in Word. Every patient report costs you an evening.
pain.card3Text: Booking in one app, WhatsApp on your phone, records in a spreadsheet, billing somewhere else. Nothing talks to anything.

journey.title: What happens when a patient finds your clinic
journey.step1Title: They book themselves (or your team books for them).
journey.step1Text: Your public link works 24/7, in the patient's language, with automatic WhatsApp confirmation; your therapist or front desk can also book from the internal calendar in seconds.
journey.step2Text: On the first appointment, your assessment battery goes out automatically by email and WhatsApp. They answer on their phone; you get everything scored and ready.
journey.step3Title: The session ends on the same screen it started.
journey.step3Text: Progress note, payment link (card or local methods) and the follow-up visit booked — without switching tabs.
journey.step4Title: The report goes out in one click.
journey.step4Text: The patient report, with the visual assessment map, lands in their inbox from a single button.
journey.step5Text: Day-before reminders, post-session check-ins, 3-day and 30-day messages — automatic, in each patient's language.

bio3.title: Your patient sees their own progress.
bio3.body: The Bio³ Map turns questionnaire answers into a visual 3-axis pyramid — Balance, Vitality and Support. Instead of loose numbers, an image your patient understands in seconds. Clarity builds trust; trust builds adherence to the plan YOU define.
bio3.note: The full Neuro ID clinical method is exclusive to trained professionals — talk to us.

ai.title: AI drafts. You decide.
ai.bullet1: Report drafts and case insights in minutes
ai.bullet2: Lab reading from photo or PDF
ai.bullet4: Everything passes YOUR approval before reaching the patient — always.

profiles.title: Made for your field
profiles.body: Pick your profile — integrative, physio, mental health, nutrition or wellness — and your clinic starts ready: session types, intake and questionnaires for your context. Then edit everything: questions, order, record sections, branding, pricing. The method is yours; the engine is ours.

trust.title: Your data, properly protected.
trust.item2: Patient documents in private storage with expiring links
trust.item3: Consent records with timestamp and IP
trust.item4: Patient portal with revocable access and audit trail

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Do I need a card to try it?
faq.a1: No. 30 full days of the Professional plan, no card. At the end, you choose a plan or your data stays safely stored, waiting for you.
faq.a2: Yes — assisted import during onboarding and fast bulk registration. Your data is yours: export everything whenever you want.
faq.q3: Does it work for a clinic with more than one professional?
faq.a3: Yes: access roles (manager, professional, front desk), per-professional calendar and payout tracking in the financials.
faq.a4: Each patient has their own language: confirmations, reminders and reports go out in Portuguese or English, automatically.
faq.a5: No lock-in. Cancel from your own dashboard; export your data first, without asking anyone's permission.

cta.title: Next week can look different.
cta.subtitle: Set up your clinic in 5 minutes. Decide in 30 days — with a fuller schedule and freer evenings.
